title: Release bee 1.1.1 — p2 integrity-guard hardening
action: Patch bump 1.1.0->1.1.1 across the release tuple (both state.mjs, both plugin.json), refresh fixture pins, regenerate ledger+manifest. Carries the p2 hardening (shared hashFile, manifest guard in verify, fixture readdirSync fix).

prohibitions: do not desync the tuple or mirrors

verify: node scripts/test_release_tuple.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: bee 1.1.1 released: patch bump carrying the p2 integrity-guard hardening. 13-suite green, tuple consistent, drift:false.
